company_name: JTG E-Business Software Pvt Ltd (Josh Technology Group)
stream_required: B.E / B.Tech (CS / IT / ECE), M.E / M.Tech (CS / IT), M.Sc (CS), MCA - (Only for CU & CEC Students)
date_of_joining: Sep / Oct 2025 (leaves will be provided for examination)

package_salary.ppo_ctc: Stipend during 10 months of Internship : Rs 22,500 per month Salary after 10 months of Internship will be as under : Fixed PB FY Bonus SY Bonus Total 8,85,000 70,800 1,00,000 1,50,000 12,05,800
package_salary.bond: If the student does not wish to join JTG E-Business Software Pvt Ltd post successful completion of the internship, or leaves before 6 Months after starting full-time employment, he/she will be entitled to pay an amount of INR 1,00,000 to JTG E-Business Software Pvt Ltd. The bond condition is also applicable in case he/she doesn’t complete the entire internship duration and chooses to leave in between. A signed cheque of INR 1,00,000 in the name of JTG E-Business Software Pvt Ltd has to be deposited as a security. This shall be returned to him/her post-completion of 6 months of full-time employment.
